THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF JASON OBERON MARCUS IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT DPW IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF INFORMED THE CLERK THAT THIS MATTER HAD BEEN PREVIOUSLY LITIGATED AND A JUDGMENT WAS ISSUED, PLAINTIFF THEN REQUESTED A DISMISSAL OF THE ACTION. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: MURLENE J RANDLE; CLERK: N.WEBB. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
